svg.title: QuickMove AI Operations Platform — complete system overview
svg.desc: Seven execution phases from customer acquisition to operations intelligence, with the AI operations intelligence layer running continuously across all phases and the human-in-the-loop approval chain

g.text: Intake · requirement collection · profile creation · identity verification
Task generation · resource allocation · timeline · risk assessment
Search · broker coordination · recommendation · site visits · booking
Logistics planning · vendor booking · live monitoring · exceptions
Utility activation · doc tracking · address updates · dependency monitor
Issue resolution · communication · feedback · case closure
KPI dashboard · vendor perf · analytics · risk prediction · exec reports
